content:
{
  "artifact_type": "srx_ace_build_agent",
  "depth_tier": "D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE",
  "runtime_target": "Codex",
  "should_block": false,
  "blocked_reason": null,
  "compiled_intent": {
    "Objective": "Build an SRX ACE build agent for finance operations within a European Union law firm, using the compliance lens to ensure regulatory adherence and audit readiness.",
    "Scope": "The agent shall generate, validate, and deploy finance operation workflows, contracts, and reports that comply with EU financial regulations (e.g., MiFID II, GDPR, AML directives). It must handle overbroad one-pass lock inputs by enforcing strict validation gates and rejecting ambiguous or incomplete data.",
    "Constraints": [
      "All outputs must be GDPR-compliant and respect data minimization.",
      "No execution of financial transactions without explicit human approval.",
      "Must log all validation failures and blocked actions for audit trails.",
      "Must operate within the law firm's existing IT infrastructure and Codex runtime.",
      "Must not expose client confidential data beyond encrypted storage."
    ],
    "Success Criteria": [
      "Agent successfully parses and validates at least 95% of finance ops requests against compliance rules.",
      "All validation gates produce explicit pass/fail evidence with timestamps.",
      "Generated artifacts (contracts, reports) pass a mock regulatory audit checklist.",
      "Overbroad one-pass lock inputs are rejected with clear reason codes.",
      "System produces a final compliance evidence report for each processed case."
    ],
    "Output Contract": {
      "format": "JSON",
      "fields": [
        {"name": "artifact_id", "type": "string", "description": "Unique identifier for the generated artifact"},
        {"name": "validation_gates", "type": "array", "items": {"type": "object", "properties": {"gate_name": "string", "status": "string", "evidence": "string", "timestamp": "string"}}},
        {"name": "compliance_report", "type": "object", "properties": {"regulation": "string", "status": "string", "details": "string"}},
        {"name": "blocked_reason", "type": "string", "nullable": true},
        {"name": "final_report", "type": "object", "properties": {"summary": "string", "recommendations": "array"}}
      ],
      "required": ["artifact_id", "validation_gates", "compliance_report", "final_report"]
    }
  }
}
